attributes.prompt: Upgrade the lodash dependency to version 4.17.21

201.html:
data [required]

object

A single AI workflow resource.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes of an AI workflow.

completed_at

date-time

Timestamp when the workflow completed. Null if not yet completed.

created_at [required]

date-time

Timestamp when the workflow was created.

entities [required]

[array]

A list of entity groups. Each group is processed in a separate workflow execution.

filtering_logic [required]

object

Arbitrary filtering criteria used to select entities for the workflow.

grouping_logic [required]

string

The logic used to group entities into execution batches.

idp_campaign_id [required]

string

The IDP campaign ID associated with this workflow.

max_number_of_entities_per_session [required]

int64

Maximum number of entities processed in a single execution session.

prompt [required]

string

The AI prompt guiding the dependency upgrade automation.

repository [required]

string

The target repository in owner/repo format.

updated_at [required]

date-time

Timestamp when the workflow was last updated.

user [required]

string

The username of the user who created the workflow.

workflow_id [required]

uuid

The UUID of the underlying Datadog Workflow Automation workflow.

workflow_name [required]

string

The human-readable name of the workflow.

id [required]

uuid

The unique identifier of the AI workflow.

type [required]

enum

The resource type for AI workflows. Allowed enum values: ai-workflows

400.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.

200.html:
data [required]

object

Data for execution steps response.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes of an execution steps response.

steps [required]

[object]

completed_at

date-time

Timestamp when the step completed. Null if not yet completed.

error

string

Error message if the step failed.

id [required]

string

The unique identifier of the execution step.

name [required]

string

The name of the step.

started_at

date-time

Timestamp when the step started. Null if not yet started.

status [required]

enum

The current status of the step. Allowed enum values: PENDING,RUNNING,COMPLETED,FAILED,CANCELED

id [required]

uuid

The unique identifier of the workflow execution.

type [required]

enum

The resource type for workflow execution steps. Allowed enum values: workflow-execution-steps
